classification.description: Deed of charge over credit balances

particulars.description: Barclays bank PLC re A. create limited. Current account. Account number 63254305. the charge creates a fixed charge over all the deposit(s) referred to in the schedule to the form MG01 (including all or any part of the money payable pursuant to such deposit(s) & the debts represented thereby) together with all interest from time to time accruing thereon. It also creates an assignment by the chargor for the purposes of & to give effect to the security over the right of the chargor to require repayment of such deposit(s) & interest thereon.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company to the chargee on any account whatsoever
